name: Stripe
description: Accept payments, manage customers, and handle subscriptions with Stripe's payment processing API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
Stripe is the world's leading payment processing platform. Use this plugin to manage customers, payment intents, charges, refunds, products, and checkout sessions. Stripe uses form-encoded request bodies for POST requests.

**Authentication:** Requires a Stripe Secret Key passed as a Bearer token.

**Amounts:** All monetary amounts are in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD).

Authorization.description: Stripe secret API key (Environment variable: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY)

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: Returns a list of customers. Customers can be filtered by email address.

starting_after.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last object from the previous page

ending_before.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the first object from the next page

tools.name: Create Customer
tools.description: Creates a new customer object in Stripe.

name.description: Customer's full name or business name

description.description: An arbitrary string to describe the customer

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs for storing additional information

tools.name: Get Customer
tools.description: Retrieves the details of an existing customer by their ID.

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer (e.g. cus_xxxx)

tools.name: Create Payment Intent
tools.description: Creates a PaymentIntent object to track a payment through its lifecycle.

amount.description: Amount to charge in the smallest currency unit (e.g. 1000 = $10.00 USD)

currency.description: Three-letter ISO currency code (e.g. usd, eur, gbp)

customer.description: ID of the customer to attach the PaymentIntent to

description.description: An arbitrary string to describe the payment

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs for storing additional information

tools.name: Confirm Payment Intent
tools.description: Confirms a PaymentIntent, attempting to collect payment according to its configuration.

id.description: The ID of the PaymentIntent to confirm

payment_method.description: ID of the payment method to attach and confirm with

tools.name: List Payment Intents
tools.description: Returns a list of PaymentIntents, optionally filtered by customer.

starting_after.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last object from the previous page

tools.name: Create Refund
tools.description: Creates a refund for an existing charge or payment intent.

charge.description: ID of the charge to refund (provide this or payment_intent)

payment_intent.description: ID of the PaymentIntent to refund (provide this or charge)

amount.description: Amount to refund in smallest currency unit. Omit for full refund.

reason.description: Reason for the refund: duplicate, fraudulent, or requested_by_customer

tools.name: List Products
tools.description: Returns a list of products available in your Stripe account.

active.description: Filter by active status. true returns only active products.

starting_after.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last object from the previous page

tools.name: Create Product
tools.description: Creates a new product in your Stripe account.

name.description: The product's name, visible to customers

description.description: The product's description, visible to customers

active.description: Whether the product is available for purchase. Defaults to true.

metadata.description: Set of key-value pairs for storing additional information

tools.name: List Charges
tools.description: Returns a list of charges, optionally filtered by customer or date range.

starting_after.description: Cursor for pagination - ID of the last object from the previous page

created.description: Unix timestamp to filter charges created after this time

tools.name: Create Checkout Session
tools.description: Creates a Stripe Checkout Session for a one-time payment, subscription, or setup.

success_url.description: URL to redirect the customer to after successful payment

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect the customer to if they cancel

mode.description: Session mode: payment, subscription, or setup

line_items.description: Array of line items (required for payment mode). Each item has price and quantity.
